use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATING INSOMNIA CHARACTERIZED BY DIFFICULTY WITH SLEEP ONSET

indications.text:
Edluar (zolpidem tartrate) sublingual tablets are indicated for the short-term treatment of
insomnia characterized by difficulties with sleep initiation [see Clinical Studies (14)].
The clinical trials performed with Zolpidem tartrate in support of efficacy were 4-5 weeks in
duration with the final ...
